_doc: Neutral example topic — demonstrates the question/facts schema. Replace with your own.
persona: A reader fact-checking common general-knowledge claims.

questions.q: What is the approximate speed of light in vacuum?
What does photosynthesis do with light energy?
At what temperature does water freeze at standard atmospheric pressure?
Which is the highest mountain above sea level on Earth?
Which is the largest ocean on Earth?
In which city is the Eiffel Tower located?
